allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const deps = Object.keys\(p.packages\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('node_modules/'\)\).map\(k => k.replace\('node_modules/',''\)\); ['next','react','framer-motion','@react-three/fiber','@react-three/drei','three','lenis','openai','tailwindcss','@tailwindcss/postcss'].forEach\(d => console.log\(d, deps.includes\(d\) ? '✓' : '✗ MISSING'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package-lock.json'\); ['next','react','framer-motion','@react-three/fiber','@react-three/drei','three','lenis','openai','tailwindcss','@tailwindcss/postcss'].forEach\(d => { const pkg = p.packages['node_modules/' + d]; console.log\(d + '@' + \(pkg ? pkg.version : 'n/a'\)\) }\)")
